title: Fletchery
description: Add functionality to the fletching table and more ways to have fun with arrows
body:
# Description

Adds a GUI to the fletching table, and by default provides a more efficient way for crafting arrows. 

![Fletching Table GUI](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/SSsSvXda/images/15b4e06c6e474be0d96fbd3b0719140418c9eed7.png)

Recipes can be added via datapack, using the `fletchery:fletching` recipe type.
